pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for the target Java version.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/service/Repor.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner syntax.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/AppPaths.j.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path construction.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/backup/Bac.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for Java 21 compatibility.
src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/backup/Bac.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0 on lists; using getFirst() avoids deprecation warnings and prepares for future removal.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/controller.why_exists: The method add(int, E) was deprecated in Java 21 and may be removed in future versions; using addFirst ensures compatibility with the new API.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/controller.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner syntax.
Replace the legacy List.add(int index, E element) method with the new List.addFirst(E element) method introduced in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/controller.why_exists: The method addFirst is a new default method in the List interface in Java 21; while add(0, ...) still compiles, the migration recipe explicitly targets modernizing API usage to the new standard library additions.

src/main/java/com/qdc/lims/ui/controller.general_idea: Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line string literals.
